word: G210 - ἄκων - ákōn - ak'-ohn - Against the will

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἄκων

- Transliteration: Akon

- Phonetic: ak'-ohn

- Definition:

1. not of one's own will, unwillingly, against the will

- Origin: from G1 (as a negative particle) and G1635

- TDNT entry: 09:49,2

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1 (as a negative particle) and G1635; unwilling: - against the will.
